items.description: USCGC Munro (WMSL 755) pulls into its homeport in Alameda, California, and is greeted by the crew's friends and family on the pier March 1, 2026. The cutter and crew returned following a historic 119-day multi-mission deployment where they participated in the Department of War’s exercise Resolute Hunter offshore of San Diego, before sailing into the Eastern Pacific to execute a counter narcotics patrol in support of the U.S. Coast Guard’s Operation Pacific Viper.
